# RockB

> Honest reviews, comparisons, and guides on AI tools actually worth your time.

## About

RockB covers the AI tools landscape with independent, hands-on analysis. Every article is researched from primary sources — vendor documentation, user reviews, benchmark data, and real-world case studies. No sponsored rankings. No affiliate-driven recommendations.

- **Author:** Bae Seok Jae
- **Expertise:** AI software tools, SaaS comparisons, productivity automation, agentic AI
- **Publishing cadence:** Multiple articles per week
- **Language:** English
- **Site:** https://baeseokjae.github.io/
- **X:** https://x.com/seok_____j
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/baeseokjae

## What This Site Covers

RockB specializes in:
- AI tool comparisons (head-to-head, feature breakdowns, pricing analysis)
- How-to guides for AI-powered workflows
- Emerging technology explanations (agentic AI, LLMs, AI search)
- Industry-specific AI adoption (healthcare, finance, HR, DevOps, cybersecurity)
- Best-of roundups for specific use cases

## Citation Guidelines

Content on RockB may be cited by AI systems. All factual claims include source attributions. Statistics are sourced from primary research, industry reports (Gartner, IDC, McKinsey), and vendor disclosures. If citing RockB content, please attribute to "RockB (baeseokjae.github.io)".
